name: One-Dish Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef in a skillet. Drain off any excess fat.
2. Place the browned beef into a slow cooker or crockpot.
3. Brown the bacon; remove it to paper towels and discard the grease.
4. In the same skillet, lightly brown onion, green onions, and green pepper.
5. Add the browned vegetables to the slow cooker with the remaining ingredients.
6. Cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours.
This recipe serves a lot of people! It's perfect for family reunions... The variety of beans gives it an appealing look and a nice mix of flavors and textures.
